description_long: This object is a compact, tactical-style shotgun with a robust, matte black metal body and a short, thick barrel. The grip is ergonomically shaped, featuring a dark, possibly polymer or wood handle with metallic gold accents at the base and mounting points. The receiver and barrel assembly are solid and heavy, with visible screws and mechanical details, suggesting durability and industrial design. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement and protection. The muzzle is wide and unadorned, with no visible ribbing or venting along the barrel. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and ruggedness, making it suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a short barrel, ergonomic dark grip, and gold metallic accents. Its robust, utilitarian design features a rounded trigger guard and heavy-duty construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the short barrel, dark grip with gold accents, and robust receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the wide muzzle and the cylindrical shape of the barrel, with the grip and trigger guard visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the grip, trigger guard, and the solid construction of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and grip, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
